nasb.text: “Thus says the whole congregation of the Lord, ‘What is this unfaithful act which you have committed against the God of Israel, turning away from following the Lord this day, by building yourselves an altar, to rebel against the Lord this day?

esv.text: “Thus says the whole congregation of the Lord, ‘What is this breach of faith that you have committed against the God of Israel in turning away this day from following the Lord by building yourselves an altar this day in rebellion against the Lord?

cnv.text: “耶和華的全體會眾這樣說：‘你們作的是甚麼事？竟對以色列的　神不忠，今日轉離不跟從耶和華，為自己築了一座壇，背叛了耶和華。

ccb.text: “耶和华的全体会众问你们，你们怎能这样背叛以色列的上帝，离弃耶和华，为自己另建祭坛呢？
